response.overview: Set against the radical politics of 1971 Ann Arbor, Panther by the Tail follows a young activist as she fights to free her imprisoned leader while navigating the personal cost of revolution. Based on a true story.
response.tagline: Set against the radical politics of 1971 Ann Arbor, Panther by the Tail follows a young activist as she fights to free her imprisoned leader while navigating the personal cost of revolution. Based on a true story.
response.title: Panther By the Tail
